titleStmt.title: SII 25.199: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 199. (A.R. No. 199 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The details of date given in the record are Regnal year 31, Mēsha, Pañchami, Monday and Anusha-nakshatra.

This epigraph records the grant of two mā of lands called Śaḍaiyappaṉnilam at Parāntakapuram by the nagarattār of this place situated in the western division (mēlai-vagipāyiṭṭa) of Umbar-nāḍu for the food-offerings to the deity Sūriyadēva (Sun-god) east prākāra (kīḻait-tirunaḍai-māḷigai) in the temple of Tiru Vuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puraṅkarambai-nāḍu. It also refers to the remission of taxes and grant of the same made over as iṟaiyili. The ūr has to meet the taxes specified here. The document was caused to be recorded on stone in the tirumāḷigai. One of the signatories in this document was Vayirapālaṉ, two others being Udaiyapālaṉ and Daṉmapālaṉ. Tumbūruḍaiyāṉ figures as the ūr-kaṇakku just as in the other record dated in the same year (A.R.Ep., 1908, No. 198).

It may be suggested that since some of the signatories of this and the other record discussed above are the same in view of the fact that both the places are located in the western division of Umbar-nāḍu. Vikramābharaṇapuram and Parāntakapuram are the places close by.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cirācarācatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pañcamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṇiḻattu nāḷ Umparnāṭṭu melaivakai pāyiṭṭa nakaram parāntakapurattu nakarattom Olai . nammūr kaṇakku tumpuruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭupuṟaṅka� nāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉiccaturvveti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil kiḻaittirunaṭaimāḷikai
vaṭapāricattu Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkiṟa cūriyatevaṟkku Amutupaṭi viñcaṉaṅkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟukku Uṭalāka nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa Eṅkaḷuril caṭaiyappaṉ Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai vāyilārkaḷ Iṟaiyili nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Āṇṭār IllaiyāṉuṟaivarRead ‘niṉaippiṭṭu’nilattukkum kaṭaṅkaṉ Āḻakaṉ nilattukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cākkāṉattu kiḻai Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nāyakaṉ nampi nilattukku
teṟkum Āka Iḷacanta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅkap patiṉāṟu kolāl nilam rūpāy Innilam Iraṇṭu māvum Iṟṟai nāḷil Amutu paṭi viñcaṉattukkuṭalākakkāṇiyum Iṟaiyili Ākak kuṭuttom Iṉṉāḷ mutal Iṉṉilattāluḷḷa Iṟai kaḻittu Iṉṉilattāl vanta Oṭṭum pāṭṭamum Iṟaiyili viniyokamum Ūrile Eṟaṭṭu Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭu māvum cantirātittavarai Iṟaiyi
liyāka tiṟakkakaṭavatākavum Antarāyam Uṟaināḻi koyiṟṟamappeṟum Ūrviṉiyokam niṉaippiṭṭut taṇṭum vaṟkaṅkaḷum maṟṟu Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Ūrile Eṟaṭṭu Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Innilam Ippaṭikku tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi tirumāḷikaiyile kal veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum koṇṭa Ivvūr nakarattom Ivvūrkaṇakku tumpūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai vayirapālaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Ippaṭikku Ivai Uttamapālaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Irācarācataṉma pālaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Utaiyapālaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai taṉmapālaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Itu Uṭaiyār vimiciramuṭaiyār koyil civapirāmaṇaril vetapaṭṭaṉ cayiññaiyāṉamaikku Ivai tumpūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai taṉmapālaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
